title: Golden-path governed human-agent collaboration
description: A HumanWorker and AgentWorker complete one WorkSession under Policy, create a scoped Request, resolve it through Review approval, record shared Contribution, export EvidenceManifest, and carry governed Learning into future work.

known_patterns: ask for bounded approval before external source collection

operating_constraints: record PolicyDecision before action affects WorkSession state
create Request when Policy denies action

escalation_rules.reason: HumanWorker review gates external source collection.

genesis_request.objective: Produce an evidence-backed answer with human review and governed learning.

active.objective: Produce an evidence-backed answer with human review and governed learning.

completed.objective: Produce an evidence-backed answer with human review and governed learning.

external_source_denied.reason: Policy requires HumanWorker review before external source collection.

external_source_allowed.reason: HumanWorker Review created bounded ApprovalScope for this action.

pending.reason_summary: External source access is outside current Policy until HumanWorker review.
pending.requested_outcome: Approve external source collection for this WorkSession only.
pending.human_decision_needed: Approve, narrow, deny, correct, or take over the blocked action.

options.label: Approve current WorkSession scope
options.effect: AgentWorker collects the referenced source for this WorkSession only.

options.label: Deny external collection
options.effect: AgentWorker continues with existing evidence and records the limitation.

default_if_no_response.reason: The blocked action remains stopped and the WorkSession records an evidence limitation.

pending.missing_permission_or_context: Policy grant for external source collection

approved.reason_summary: External source access is outside current Policy until HumanWorker review.
approved.requested_outcome: Approve external source collection for this WorkSession only.
approved.human_decision_needed: Approve, narrow, deny, correct, or take over the blocked action.

options.label: Approve current WorkSession scope
options.effect: AgentWorker collects the referenced source for this WorkSession only.

options.label: Deny external collection
options.effect: AgentWorker continues with existing evidence and records the limitation.

default_if_no_response.reason: The blocked action remains stopped and the WorkSession records an evidence limitation.

approved.missing_permission_or_context: Policy grant for external source collection

approve_source.comments: Approved for the referenced source and current WorkSession only.

portable_export.objective: Produce an evidence-backed answer with human review and governed learning.

proposed_change.pattern: Ask for bounded external source approval before collecting evidence outside local context.

content.pattern: External source collection requires bounded approval tied to WorkSession, Actor, action hash, expiry, and max uses.

trigger_conditions: AgentWorker needs evidence outside local context
Policy denies or requires review for the action
procedure: Create scoped Request with risk, options, and fallback
Wait for Review approval or narrowing
review_checks: ApprovalScope binds action hash, WorkSession, Actor, expiry, and max uses

post_session.reason: Post-session feedback confirms the bounded Request and Review loop improved future source collection.

payload.summary: WorkSession created with HumanWorker, AgentWorker, objective, and Policy.
Policy denied external source collection and required Request.
AgentWorker created scoped Request for HumanWorker approval.
HumanWorker approved Request with bounded ApprovalScope.
AgentWorker captured source summary evidence during work.
Shared Contribution recorded with human and agent contributor refs.
Pair learning recorded from Request, Review, and evidence capture.
MemoryProposal keeps durable memory change governed.
SkillProposal keeps reusable process change governed.

assertions.required_state: host_shape_ref is present, uses an allowed v0.1 value, is fixture metadata only, and does not appear inside records, operation bodies, JarvisEvents, EvidenceManifest, or export payloads
WorkSession-scoped mutations include six zero-trust headers; non-WorkSession mutations include the non-WorkSession mutation headers; reads omit mutation-only headers
HumanWorker and AgentWorker are represented by Worker records with required authority and accountability scope
HumanWorker and AgentWorker are represented by Actor records with event authority and contribution scope
Every accepted WorkSession-scoped state change records Actor, expected revision, previous hash, and event hash
AgentWorker action affecting WorkSession has PolicyDecision before accepted protocol state and denied result includes request_id
Request.policy_decision_id matches blocking PolicyDecision and approved status includes resolved_by_review_id
ApprovalScope binds request, review, PolicyDecision, action hash, actor, WorkSession, expiry, and max uses
Shared Contribution preserves human and agent contributor refs that point to valid Worker and Actor records

EvidenceManifest exports only after completed WorkSession, records event chain root, evidence items with source_event_refs, PolicyDecisions, Requests, Reviews, Takeovers, Contributions, limitations, export profile, terminal export state, and excludes forbidden host-private fields
LearningRecord captures pair learning and MemoryProposal plus SkillProposal remain governed pending review
OutcomeReport references LearningRecord without mutating sealed WorkSession, EvidenceManifest, or LearningRecord state
